name: Beike Tripod ZP100
description: Holds tablet vertically or horizontally! View angle adjustment.Great for video chat, watching movies, playing games, display or marketing and reading eBooks on your tablet in home, office or exhibition Release your hands for doing something else.

features.Key Features:: Material: Aluminum alloy + ABS | Weight: 0.42kg | Extend: 142cm | Folded: 33cm | Width: 5cm | Portable and flexible, ideal for outdoor, travel and timer shoots | Bluetooth controller provided which make selfie/wefie easier. | Compatible with all Kinds of Digital Cameras, Camcorder or smart phon. | With grip for adjusting head position | Aluminum Stick which last longer
